text:
The Hermit's Scroll (, Inja no Sho) is an elusive scroll that Hanzo seeks to obtain. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 6 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

Before the Hunter Exam began, Tonpa greets Hanzo, who catches the man off guard with his loquaciousness. Hanzo mentions to Tonpa that he desires to become a Hunter so he can gain the Hunter License's privileges Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 37 so he can seek and obtain the elusive Hermit's Scroll, because it's rumored to be located in a country barred to commoners. 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

The Hermit's Scroll is not mentioned in the 1999 anime adaptation.
In the 2011 anime adaptation the item's name is "The Ultimate Ninja Scroll" (最強忍者の書, Hunter × Hunter - Episode 3 (2011) Saikyō Ninja no Sho—literally meaning "Book of the Strongest Ninja").
